metadata.label: HugeCode repository execution defaults
metadata.description: Repo-owned launch defaults and validation presets for manual and GitHub source-linked delegation.

validationPresets.label: Review first
validationPresets.description: Fast read-first validation for tightly supervised work.

validationPresets.label: Standard
validationPresets.description: Default repo validation bundle for delegated implementation work.

validationPresets.label: Fast lane
validationPresets.description: Fast validation bundle for high-autonomy reruns and low-risk follow-ups.

reviewProfiles.label: Default Review
reviewProfiles.description: General workspace review profile for delegated implementation work.

reviewProfiles.label: Issue Review
reviewProfiles.description: Issue-linked review profile that emphasizes correctness and policy checks.

reviewProfiles.label: PR Follow-up Review
reviewProfiles.description: PR follow-up profile that keeps review-first validation and bounded autofix available.
